title: Canadian Alcohol and Drugs Survey - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Substance Use Survey
Data about Canadians' use of alcohol and drugs.
Explore substance use data by province and more with our interactive tool .
Survey results summaries, including technical notes, definitions of key terms, and detailed tables:
CSUS has previously been named the Canadian Alcohol and Drugs Survey (CADS, 2019), the Canadian Tobacco, Alcohol and Drugs Survey (CTADS, 2013 - 2017) and the Canadian Alcohol and Drug use Monitoring Survey (CADUMS, 2008 - 2012). Copies of pre-2011 reports can be requested by email at odrs-brsd@hc-sc.gc.ca .
